name: First Baptist Carthage
description: First Baptist Carthage is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Carthage, MS. There are 2 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are private. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: The Carthage Court
description: The Carthage Court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Carthage, MS. There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, lights, adaptive programming, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are available. A one-time fee is required to play.
